example: select onager_create_graph('my_graph', true);
select onager_drop_graph('my_graph');
select onager_add_node('my_graph', 1);

comment: Returns: integer. Params: (graph, src, dst, weight)
example: select onager_add_edge('my_graph', 1, 2, 1.0);
select onager_list_graphs();
select onager_node_count('my_graph');
select onager_edge_count('my_graph');
select onager_node_in_degree('my_graph', 1);
select onager_node_out_degree('my_graph', 1);
